name: Whispering Mask
description:
She is a slime girl, but in truth, she's the mask. So yeah, parasitic possessive mask that turns you into her host.

The "Whispering Woods" is a location brought up in most fantasy RPG bots.

Time to live up to its reputation.

BTW: This contains Vore, Absorption, and some Drama (kinda)
creator: Autistic Internet Freak
